name: gamma
description: Networked multiplayer party game framework — Jackbox-style, phone controllers + TV display

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=server && npm install --workspace=client/tv && npm install --workspace=client/phone
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,tv,phone -c cyan,green,yellow "npm run dev --workspace=server" "npm run dev --workspace=client/tv" "npm run dev --workspace=client/phone"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client/tv && npm run build --workspace=client/phone
